match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {

  },

    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, clean morning mood with effortless cool"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_3",

    "visualSummary": "Fresh sensory effortlessly cool breezy coastal mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_4",

    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - VANITY",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh sensory effortlessly cool morning ritual"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_5",
    "title": "Close On Lips Detail",
    "storyBeat": "Product detail shot of coral lips",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - VANITY",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory and effortlessly cool with clean morning freshness"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_6",
    "title": "Shoreline Water Splash",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett in water enjoying product",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - DAY",

  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_7",

    "storyBeat": "Product on sand and final wide beauty shot",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal moment with potential energy of movement"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
